description: A taxpayer wants to know if their e-filed return has been accepted by the IRS.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the submission ID for the taxpayer's e-filed return.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the unique identifier for the tax return submission.

nodes.task_description: Check the status of the submission with the IRS e-file system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent's query returns a status of 'Accepted'.

nodes.task_description: Inform the taxpayer that their return has been successfully accepted by the IRS.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the good news to the taxpayer.
